explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.findings: Articles mention the auditing of AI systems and models.
external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Publish third-party audit results, certifications, or regulatory compliance documentation.

relevant_sources.summary: This article, summarizing panels from the 2024 AI Summit, provides evidence for the **fairness**, **governance**, and **external_accountability** pillars of responsible AI. It supports **fairness** by discussing the identification and understanding of bias within systems. The article also touches on **governance** by highlighting the need for continuous calibration of AI, implying ongoing management. Finally, it supports **external_accountability** through mentions of auditing AI systems and models, suggesting a commitment to external review.
relevant_sources.title: Breaking Down The 2024 AI Summit Panels

fairness.findings: Articles discuss the identification and understanding of bias within systems.
fairness.path_to_improvement: Publish bias testing results, outcome monitoring, or vendor fairness certifications.

relevant_sources.summary: This article, summarizing panels from the 2024 AI Summit, provides evidence for the **fairness**, **governance**, and **external_accountability** pillars of responsible AI. It supports **fairness** by discussing the identification and understanding of bias within systems. The article also touches on **governance** by highlighting the need for continuous calibration of AI, implying ongoing management. Finally, it supports **external_accountability** through mentions of auditing AI systems and models, suggesting a commitment to external review.
relevant_sources.title: Breaking Down The 2024 AI Summit Panels

governance.findings: Press releases reference the announcement of a strategic partnership for AI integration and the establishment of an intellectual property framework for AI-based welding. Articles also highlight the need for continuous calibration of AI.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for **governance** and **transparency** in responsible AI. It supports transparency by describing the AI products and capabilities offered by C3 AI and the intended application of AI solutions across shipbuilding functions. The press release also indicates governance through the announcement of a strategic partnership to integrate AI, implying oversight and planning for its use in core business operations.
relevant_sources.title: HII and C3 AI Form Strategic Partnership to Boost U.S. Navy Shipbuilding Efficiency

relevant_sources.summary: This article, summarizing panels from the 2024 AI Summit, provides evidence for the **fairness**, **governance**, and **external_accountability** pillars of responsible AI. It supports **fairness** by discussing the identification and understanding of bias within systems. The article also touches on **governance** by highlighting the need for continuous calibration of AI, implying ongoing management. relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** pillar of responsible AI. It highlights the establishment of an "intellectual property framework for AI-based welding," indicating a policy approach to managing AI technology and its associated intellectual property within the context of autonomous welding in shipbuilding.
relevant_sources.title: HII and Path Robotics Sign Agreement for AI Welding

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: Press releases describe the AI products and capabilities offered by C3 AI and their intended application across shipbuilding functions. Sustainability reports also provide narrative descriptions of AI/ML capabilities being integrated for battlefield decisions.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for **governance** and **transparency** in responsible AI. It supports transparency by describing the AI products and capabilities offered by C3 AI and the intended application of AI solutions across shipbuilding functions. The press release also indicates governance through the announcement of a strategic partnership to integrate AI, implying oversight and planning for its use in core business operations.
relevant_sources.title: HII and C3 AI Form Strategic Partnership to Boost U.S. Navy Shipbuilding Efficiency

relevant_sources.summary: The "HII 2024 Sustainability Report" provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. This is supported by narrative descriptions of AI/ML capabilities being integrated for battlefield decisions, indicating a level of openness about the technology's application without detailing specific execution methods.
relevant_sources.title: HII 2024 Sustainability Report

summary.overall_findings: Huntington Ingalls Industries' public disclosures address both operational practices and policy-level considerations for responsible AI. Operational evidence includes transparency materials describing the AI products and capabilities offered by C3 AI, and governance is also documented through press releases referencing a strategic partnership to integrate AI. In total, 4 of 7 evaluated pillars have documented evidence. Fairness and external accountability are addressed at the policy level, with fairness materials discussing the identification of bias within systems and external accountability articles mentioning auditing AI systems. Based on 10 publicly available sources, no qualifying public evidence was found for explainability, oversight, and 1 additional pillar.
